title: Amendment to the Regulation on the Import of Road Vehicles
bodyHtml:
The title of the communiqué regulating the import of road vehicles, numbered 2024/7, has been changed to "Communiqué on Import Control of Road Vehicles (Product Safety and Inspection: 2024/41)."

The purpose of the communiqué has been revised as follows: "to regulate the procedures and principles regarding the inspection of the compliance of road vehicles with the relevant legislation during import."

"Self-loading or self-unloading trailers and semi-trailers for agricultural purposes " under HS Code 8716.20.00.00.00, which were previously not covered, are now included in the scope of the communiqué.

The amendment will come into force on November 14, 2024.

Click here for the Communiqué on the Amendment to the Regulation on the Import of Road Vehicles (Import: 2024/7).
